Description: Ephemeral autosign address (MsgExec grantee) that signs the EIP712 typed data
RFQ request expiry in milliseconds. 0 = no expiry
How long to wait for quotes (max 5000ms)
Action for quantity not filled by the selected quotes. Set `limit` to place a limit order at the given price, `market` to sweep the remainder as a market order. Omit to settle only the quoted amount.
Taker subaccount nonce at settlement time. Prevents replay when submitting multiple RFQs in the same block. Defaults to 0 (contract reads the on-chain nonce).
Client order ID echoed through to the on-chain trade event. Used to correlate a trade event back to the originating UI order. Not used server-side.
Real taker address (authz granter); used as MsgExecuteContractCompat sender
EVM chain ID used in the EIP712 domain separator (e.g. 1 for Injective mainnet)
EIP712 wrapper version: 'v2' uses WrapTxToEIP712V2, 'v1' uses legacy amino JSON
